title: Differential-Geometry-Guided Adversarial Negative Mining for EqM (DG-ANM)

next_action.reason: Implement baseline EqM training on CIFAR-10 with EqM-S/2, then proceed to autoresearch
next_action.hint: First: adapt upstream EqM code for single-GPU CIFAR-10 training. Then: implement DG-ANM mining. Then: /autoresearch

events.detail: Project created via /make-project. DG-ANM for EqM with CIFAR-10 Stage 1, EqM-S/2 backbone.
